context: A psychometric assessment of Viking warriors' attitudes, beliefs, and motivations within the context of Norse warrior culture and the pursuit of Valhalla. This survey captures the diverse perspectives of Viking warriors regarding honor, combat, fate, religious devotion, and social status during the Viking Age. The instrument measures how individual warriors conceptualize their role in society, their relationship to death and the afterlife, and their commitment to martial ideals.

questions.preprompt: A skald recites the deeds of warriors, and {player_name} reflects on what matters most in a warrior's life. To what extent does {player_name} agree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} believes that dying honorably in battle is far preferable to living a long life without glory.

questions.preprompt: When {player_name} considers what defines a true warrior, to what extent does {player_name} agree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} values loyalty to one's lord and reputation among peers above all other considerations.

questions.preprompt: When discussing the conduct of warriors, to what extent does {player_name} agree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} thinks that a warrior who avoids unnecessary risk is acting wisely rather than dishonorably.

questions.preprompt: As {player_name} prepares for battle, to what extent does {player_name} agree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} accepts that their fate has already been determined by the gods, and this brings {player_name} peace.

questions.preprompt: When {player_name} contemplates mortality, to what extent does {player_name} agree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} feels fear when thinking about the possibility of death in battle.

questions.preprompt: Regarding the inevitability of one's wyrd (fate), to what extent does {player_name} agree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} believes that no amount of caution or skill can change what the Norns have woven for {player_name}.

questions.preprompt: When {player_name} considers the gods and the afterlife, to what extent does {player_name} agree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} is certain that Odin and the other gods reward warriors who die with sword in hand.

questions.preprompt: Regarding religious observance and ritual, to what extent does {player_name} agree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} regularly performs religious rituals and sacrifices to honor the gods and secure their favor.

questions.preprompt: When {player_name} reflects on the teachings of the skalds about Valhalla, to what extent does {player_name} agree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} doubts that the stories about Valhalla and the gods are literally true.
